skills.name: CVR RCA
skills.description: Root cause analysis for conversion rate fluctuations across the full funnel (LP → Select → Checkout → Order). Identifies routing vs conversion splits, funnel-step drivers, and confirms root cause with Mixpanel session recordings.
skills.longDescription: The CVR RCA skill follows a structured L0 → L1 → L2+ investigation tree. It begins with an orientation from three simultaneous signals (mix dominance, Shapley decomposition, trend shape), runs the mandatory L1 Mix Cascade to determine routing vs conversion, then opens self-extending hypothesis branches until a specific mechanism × segment × date leaf is confirmed.

skills.name: CE Health
skills.description: High-level combined entity health check — traffic volume, CVR baseline, availability signal, content quality score, and pricing position relative to competitors.
skills.longDescription: The CE Health skill provides a rapid 360° view of a combined entity's key health indicators before deeper investigation. It surfaces whether traffic is growing or shrinking, whether CVR is structurally healthy, whether availability is well-configured, and whether content quality could be a drag on performance.

skills.name: Perf Audit
skills.description: Traffic deep dive — channel mix quality, geographic distribution, device splits, landing page performance, and funnel entry signal quality.
skills.longDescription: The Perf Audit skill digs into the traffic layer feeding a CE. It analyses channel composition (Google Ads, Bing, Meta, Organic, Affiliates), geographic concentration, device splits, and the quality of traffic entering each funnel step. Used when CVR changes look traffic-driven rather than funnel-driven.

skills.name: AOV RCA
skills.description: Root cause analysis for average order value changes — pricing shifts, product mix changes, currency effects, and pax-combo drivers.
skills.longDescription: The AOV RCA skill investigates why revenue per order changed. It decomposes AOV into price × quantity × mix components, identifies whether pricing changes, product mix shifts (higher/lower-value TGIDs gaining share), currency effects, or pax-combo changes are the driver.

skills.name: Availability
skills.description: Inventory-side analysis — TID-level availability windows, supply gaps, TGID health, booking lead time constraints, and fulfilment signals.
skills.longDescription: The Availability skill investigates the supply side of a CE. It runs TID snapshot queries to check which tour IDs have available inventory in a given window, identifies whether availability gaps are causing S2C drops, and surfaces whether supply configuration issues (API cut-offs, pax restrictions, date-range limits) are the root cause.
